title: ornithogalum nutans subsp. boucheanum
intro: Ornithogalum nutans subsp. boucheanum, also known as the drooping star of Bethlehem, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum nutans subsp. boucheanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
